things.name: National WWI Museum and Memorial
things.description: America's leading museum dedicated to the First World War with a stunning memorial tower

things.name: Country Club Plaza
things.description: America's first outdoor shopping center with Spanish architecture and fountains

things.name: Nelson-Atkins Museum of Art
things.description: World-class art museum famous for its shuttlecock sculptures on the lawn

things.name: Kansas City Power & Light District
things.description: Vibrant entertainment district with bars, restaurants and live music in the heart of downtown

things.name: Kansas City Zoo
things.description: 202-acre zoo home to over 1,700 animals including African and Australian sections

things.name: Arrowhead Stadium
things.description: Home of the Kansas City Chiefs NFL team, one of the loudest stadiums in the world

things.name: Arabia Steamboat Museum
things.description: 1856 steamboat excavated from a Missouri cornfield displaying 200 tons of pioneer cargo

things.name: Kansas City BBQ Trail
things.description: World-famous barbecue scene with iconic joints like Joe's, Arthur Bryant's and Gates

things.name: Kemper Museum of Contemporary Art
things.description: Free contemporary art museum with rotating exhibitions and a sculpture garden

things.name: Union Station Kansas City
things.description: Beautifully restored 1914 Beaux-Arts train station housing science exhibits and restaurants
